data.title: Robinhood to List PENGU, PNUT and Popcat
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Robinhood US announced that it will launch Pudgy Penguins (PENGU), Peanut the Squirrel (PNUT) and Popcat.

data.title: Economic Uncertainty Challenges Fed's Rate Decisions
data.description: According to Odaily, Generali Investments analyst Paolo Zanghieri highlighted in a report that the unpredictable economic policy statements from U.S. President Donald Trump's administration have introduced significant uncertainty, complicating the Federal Reserve's tasks. Zanghieri noted that the health of the U.S. economy suggests the Federal Reserve is unlikely to rush into rate cuts until some policy uncertainties are resolved. He referred to comments made by Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell last week, stating, "We expect this to be the main message of the March meeting, with the Federal Open Market Committee's current stance—two more rate cuts this year and two more in 2026—remaining unchanged."

data.title: Binance CEO: Trump administration’s decision to create a strategic Bitcoin reserve is a good start
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance CEO Richard Teng said when talking about the Trump administration's decision to create a strategic Bitcoin reserve, "This is a good start and may prompt other governments to consider allocating cryptocurrencies. The question is not whether to allocate, but whether to allocate 2% or 5%. So we are having a lot of such important conversations now. The long-term driving force is very strong."

data.title: BTFS airdrop rewards officially launched public beta
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, BTFS airdrop rewards have been launched in the public beta on the BTTC test network. This upgrade introduces smart contracts to issue airdrop rewards to ensure that eligible miners can receive them every day. The airdrop collection process of this test network will be based on the data of the main network environment. Global users can participate in the test and experience the airdrop collection process.

data.title: CBOE Submits XRP ETF Application for Franklin
data.description: According to Odaily, the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE) has submitted an application for an XRP Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) on behalf of Franklin. The Cboe BZX, a subsidiary of the Chicago Board Options Exchange Group, has filed a proposed rule change with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) through a 19b-4 application document.

data.title: Analyst: The current key support level of ETH may be $1,887
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto analyst Ali Martinez wrote on the X platform that the current key support level of ETH may be $1,887, because investors have accumulated about 1.63 million ETH in this price range.

data.title: Agency: Trump's policies complicate the Fed's task
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Generali Investments analyst Paolo Zanghieri said in a report that the huge uncertainty shock caused by the Trump administration's erratic economic policy statements has complicated the Fed's task. The economist said that the health of the US economy makes the Fed not rush to cut interest rates until policy uncertainty is at least partially resolved. He was referring to Fed Chairman Powell's remarks last week. He said: "We expect this to be the main message of the March meeting, and the current position of the (Federal Open Market Committee) - two more rate cuts this year and two more rate cuts in 2026 - will not change." (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance announces new stablecoin trading pair USDC/RON
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Binance announced the launch of a new stablecoin trading pair USDC/RON. In addition, Binance also announced a special communication event for regulated and MiCA-compliant stablecoin products. The event time is: 2025-03-13 12:00 (UTC) to 2025-04-13 21:59 (UTC).

data.title: Strategy's preferred stock STRK has risen 3% since the beginning of February, with lower volatility than MSTR and Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Strike (STRK), the preferred stock issued by Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), has been listed for just over a month, and its current share price has risen by 3% compared to when it was listed on February 5. Strategy's common stock has fallen by 20% during the same period, and its volatility was previously lower than that of MicroStrategy and Bitcoin. Analysts believe that preferred stocks such as STRK can be seen as a hybrid of equity and debt. If the company pays dividends, the holders have a greater right to receive dividends than common stock holders, and if the company goes bankrupt and liquidates, the holders also have the right to obtain company assets. (Coindesk)

data.title: CBOE Submits XRP ETF Application for Franklin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE) has submitted an XRP ETF application for Franklin. It is reported that Cboe BZX, a subsidiary of the Chicago Board Options Exchange Group, has submitted a proposed rule change (19b-4 application document) to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.
